meaning: n.土墩,护堤,垛vt.筑堤,堆起vi.积成堆,隆起
examples: I've got a mound of paperwork to do.
They banked the earth (up) into a mound.
The castle was built on top of a natural grassy mound.
As the blade slices, a blizzard of snow-white flakes floats onto an already headhigh mound.
The mound is a pile of rubble, 30 feet high and maybe 200 feet across.
